topic: ratio word problems, completing ratio tables

Complete the ratio table to solve the problem.

For every 2 cars you wash, your friend washes 3 cars. You wash a total of 8 cars. How many does your friend wash?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{You} & \textbf{Friend} \\
\hline
2 & 3 \\
\hline
 & \\
\hline
 & \\
\hline
8 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
